title: How Anthropic Doesn't Build the WRONG Things with Claude
summary: Austin Marchese presents four rules derived from Anthropic founders Dario and Daniela Amodei's decision-making process for determining what to build with Claude. The video offers strategic guidance on avoiding common pitfalls in building AI products, framed as applicable to side projects, startups, and business applications.
